name: @ykdz/template-repository
description: Repository workspace for the YKDZ template generator.

scripts.check: turbo run format:check lint typecheck test check:generated check:templates format:check:root lint:root typecheck:root
scripts.format:check:root: oxfmt --check --config oxfmt.config.ts package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.build.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts oxlint.config.ts test
scripts.format:write:root: oxfmt --write --config oxfmt.config.ts package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.build.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts oxlint.config.ts test
scripts.lint:fix:root: oxlint --config oxlint.config.ts oxlint.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts vitest.config.ts test --fix
scripts.lint:root: oxlint --config oxlint.config.ts oxlint.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts vitest.config.ts test
